pwd_rule_length: Your password must be between 8 and 31 characters.
pwd_rule_lowercase: Your password must contain at least 1 lowercase letter(s).
pwd_rule_number: Your password must contain at least 1 number(s).
pwd_rule_uppercase: Your password must contain at least 1 uppercase letter(s).
pwd_rule_username: Your password cannot contain your username.
